channel.title: Hack The Box on Scorpiosec
channel.description: Recent content in Hack The Box on Scorpiosec

item.title: HTB: Visual
item.description: Platform: Hack The Box Link: Visual Level: Medium OS: Windows This is a medium difficulty Windows machine with a web application accepting user submitted Git repositories URLs. The target IP address is 10.10.11.234 My IP address is 10.10.14.222 Scanning sudo nmap -sC -sV -oA nmap/Visual 10.10.11.234 I run my usual scan and I get some information: Apache web server is running on the target It is a Windows machine (Though you can see that on the machine page) A PHP application is hosted on the machine Starting Nmap 7.
